messages.content:
Click to correct the two capitalization errors.
Civil rights pioneer W. E. B. Du Bois was born in Massachusetts but became a Citizen of ghana in 1961.
Civil rights pioneer W. E. B. Du Bois was born in Massachusetts but became a citizen of Ghana in 1961.

Click to correct the one capitalization error.
In 1966, Maulana Karenga created the holiday of Kwanzaa, a weeklong celebration that honors african values and traditions.
In 1966, Maulana Karenga created the holiday of Kwanzaa, a weeklong celebration that honors African values and traditions.

Click to correct the one capitalization error.
Edward R. Murrow was a famous American journalist who became a household name during world War II when his series of radio news broadcasts were followed by millions of listeners.
Edward R. Murrow was a famous American journalist who became a household name during World War II when his series of radio news broadcasts were followed by millions of listeners.

Click to correct the two capitalization errors.
Next Friday I'm going to los angeles to audition for a part in a television commercial.
Next Friday I'm going to Los Angeles to audition for a part in a television commercial.

Click to correct the two capitalization errors.
In 1910, the Norwegian explorer Roald Amundsen became the first man to lead a successful Expedition to the South Pole.
In 1910, the Norwegian explorer Roald Amundsen became the first man to lead a successful expedition to the South Pole.

Click to correct the one capitalization error.
China is the largest country located entirely in Asia, the World's largest continent.
China is the largest country located entirely in Asia, the world's largest continent.

Click to correct the two capitalization errors.
George Washington became President after leading the fight against england in the Revolutionary War.
George Washington became president after leading the fight against England in the Revolutionary War.

Click to correct the three capitalization errors.
After Grandma Randall gave me a telescope for my Birthday, my Dad and I spent hours looking at Saturn and its amazing Rings.
After Grandma Randall gave me a telescope for my birthday, my dad and I spent hours looking at Saturn and its amazing rings.

Click to correct the four capitalization errors.
After a Blizzard dumped twelve inches of snow across the northeast, the brooklyn bridge was closed to bike riders for three days.
After a blizzard dumped twelve inches of snow across the Northeast, the Brooklyn Bridge was closed to bike riders for three days.

Click to correct the five capitalization errors.
Lasting from 1337 until 1453, the hundred years' war was a series of ongoing battles and disputes between the english and the french.
Lasting from 1337 until 1453, the Hundred Years' War was a series of ongoing battles and disputes between the English and the French.

Click to correct the three capitalization errors.
Followers of hinduism, most of whom live in india, believe in reincarnation, or the Idea that when the body dies, the spirit is reborn.
Followers of Hinduism, most of whom live in India, believe in reincarnation, or the idea that when the body dies, the spirit is reborn.

Click to correct the four capitalization errors.
Kareem abdul-Jabbar, one of the most successful basketball Players in history, was born with the name Ferdinand Alcindor, jr., but changed it after converting to islam.
Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, one of the most successful basketball players in history, was born with the name Ferdinand Alcindor, Jr., but changed it after converting to Islam.

Click to correct the five capitalization errors.
On january 1, 1863, President Abraham lincoln Issued the emancipation Proclamation, which proclaimed the freedom of slaves in the ten states that were still in Rebellion.
On January 1, 1863, President Abraham Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation, which proclaimed the freedom of slaves in the ten states that were still in rebellion.

Click to correct the three capitalization errors.
General Lee Surrendered at Appomattox Courthouse in 1865, bringing the American Civil war to an End.
General Lee surrendered at Appomattox Courthouse in 1865, bringing the American Civil War to an end.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
On our Tour of Coit Tower in San Francisco, we met some Brazilian tourists who spoke Portuguese.
On our tour of Coit Tower in San Francisco, we met some Brazilian tourists who spoke Portuguese.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
If you visit sequoia national forest, you can see the Tree known as general Sherman, which is nearly as tall as the Statue of Liberty.
If you visit Sequoia National Forest, you can see the tree known as General Sherman, which is nearly as tall as the Statue of Liberty.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
With the Invention of the Cotton gin during the Industrial Revolution, the south experienced major social and economic changes.
With the invention of the cotton gin during the Industrial Revolution, the South experienced major social and economic changes.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
The Lena River in Russia flows northeast nearly three thousand miles from its Source in the mountains to the arctic Ocean.
The Lena River in Russia flows northeast nearly three thousand miles from its source in the mountains to the Arctic Ocean.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Since its completion in 1970, the Aswan High dam across the nile River has provided egyptians with Electricity as well as protection from floods and droughts.
Since its completion in 1970, the Aswan High Dam across the Nile River has provided Egyptians with electricity as well as protection from floods and droughts.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
My aunt went white-water rafting on the Colorado River in the Grand canyon.
My aunt went white-water rafting on the Colorado River in the Grand Canyon.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Semana Santa, an important Religious Festival in Catholicism, is celebrated throughout south america with processions through the streets.
Semana Santa, an important religious festival in Catholicism, is celebrated throughout South America with processions through the streets.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Catalan is a Language spoken in the Northern part of spain, near the french Border.
Catalan is a language spoken in the northern part of Spain, near the French border.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
At 2,722 feet tall, the Burj khalifa in dubai became the tallest man-made structure in the World when its construction was completed in 2010.
At 2,722 feet tall, the Burj Khalifa in Dubai became the tallest man-made structure in the world when its construction was completed in 2010.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
The Great Pyramid of Giza stands in the Sahara desert, and one side of its Base points almost perfectly to the north.
The Great Pyramid of Giza stands in the Sahara Desert, and one side of its base points almost perfectly to the north.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Aunt Emily makes the best spaghetti carbonara, which is an Italian pasta Dish made with bacon, eggs, and cheese.
Aunt Emily makes the best Spaghetti Carbonara, which is an Italian pasta dish made with bacon, eggs, and cheese.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Many historians agree that a major factor contributing to the germans' defeat in the battle of the Bulge was their lack of Fuel.
Many historians agree that a major factor contributing to the Germans' defeat in the Battle of the Bulge was their lack of fuel.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Gracie mansion, which was built in 1799, is considered the official Residence of New York city's Mayor.
Gracie Mansion, which was built in 1799, is considered the official residence of New York City's Mayor.

Click to correct the four capitalization errors.
The Distinctive forms and colors in the Paintings of georgia o'Keeffe have come to represent the southwest.
The distinctive forms and colors in the paintings of Georgia O'Keeffe have come to represent the Southwest.

Click to correct the five capitalization errors.
After he retires, my Grandfather plans to visit the base of Mount everest and take a Boat Ride down the Amazon river.
After he retires, my grandfather plans to visit the base of Mount Everest and take a boat ride down the Amazon River.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
My Grandma told me that the best time to see neptune this Year is in Late august.
My grandma told me that the best time to see Neptune this year is in late August.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Thomas Jefferson, the third President of the United states, was an important contributor to the Declaration of Independence.
Thomas Jefferson, the third president of the United States, was an important contributor to the Declaration of Independence.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
In the mid-nineteenth century, Americans headed West in record numbers in search of more land and better opportunity.
In the mid-nineteenth century, Americans headed west in record numbers in search of more land and better opportunity.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Uncle edward explained to me that the Magna carta was written by English nobles to curb the Power of King John I.
Uncle Edward explained to me that the Magna Carta was written by English nobles to curb the power of King John I.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
After World war II, the soviet union and the United states both proposed missions to Mars, but neither sent a manned spacecraft there.
After World War II, the Soviet Union and the United States both proposed missions to Mars, but neither sent a manned spacecraft there.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
The Middle ages in europe began with the Decline of rome in the fifth century and lasted through the fourteenth Century.
The Middle Ages in Europe began with the decline of Rome in the fifth century and lasted through the fourteenth century.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Michelangelo, perhaps the greatest artist of the renaissance, is famous for the religious scenes he painted on the Ceiling of the sistine Chapel.
Michelangelo, perhaps the greatest artist of the Renaissance, is famous for the religious scenes he painted on the ceiling of the Sistine Chapel.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Quidnet Beach in massachusetts offers fantastic views of Sankaty Head Light, a Lighthouse that overlooks the Atlantic Ocean.
Quidnet Beach in Massachusetts offers fantastic views of Sankaty Head Light, a lighthouse that overlooks the Atlantic Ocean.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
According to the constitution, a person must be at least thirty years old to serve as a senator.
According to the Constitution, a person must be at least thirty years old to serve as a senator.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
When I asked dad whether the mountains and Craters on venus have names, he told me that one of the craters is named billie Holiday.
When I asked Dad whether the mountains and craters on Venus have names, he told me that one of the craters is named Billie Holiday.
What is the prefix in repack?
The prefix in "repack" is "re-".
What is the prefix in misbehaved?
The prefix in "misbehaved" is "mis-".
What is the prefix in prepack?
The prefix in "prepack" is "pre-".
What is the suffix in niceness?
The suffix in "niceness" is "-ness".
What is the suffix in unfairness?
The suffix in "unfairness" is "-ness".
What is the suffix in unreadable?
The suffix in "unreadable" is "-able".
What is the base word in unfixable?
The base word in "unfixable" is "fix".
What is the prefix in misjudgment?
The prefix in "misjudgment" is "mis-".
What is the prefix in incorrectly?
The prefix in "incorrectly" is "in-".
What is the suffix in unwearable?
The suffix in "unwearable" is "-able".
What is the base word in unusually?
The base word in "unusually" is "usual".
What is the suffix in prepayment?
The suffix in "prepayment" is "-ment".
What is the suffix in unlikable?
The suffix in "unlikable" is "-able".

What does skillful mean?
without skill
full of skill
Skillful means full of skill; showing proficiency, ability, or expertise in performing a task.

What does payment mean?
able to be paid
the result of paying
Payment means the result of paying, providing money or something else of value in exchange for goods or services.

What does harmful mean?
full of harm
without harm
Harmful means full of harm; causing harm, damage, or injury.

What does tightness mean?
without being tight
the state of being tight
in a tight way
"tightness" means the state of being tight.

What does playful mean?
the action of playing
full of play
without playing
Playful means full of play; characterized by fun, games, or a lighthearted attitude.

What does kindly mean?
the state of being kind
in a kind way
full of kindness
"Kindly" means in a kind or gentle manner.

What does drivable mean?
1. able to be driven
2. the result of driving
3. without driving
"drivable" means able to be driven.

What does strangely mean?
1. without strangeness
2. the state of being strange
3. in a strange way
"strangely" means in a strange way.

What does weakness mean?
1. able to be weak
2. the state of being weak
3. in a weak way
"weakness" means the state of being weak.

What does shipment mean?
full of ships
able to be shipped
the result of shipping
"Shipment" means the result of shipping; goods transported from one place to another.

What does repeatable mean?
full of repeating
the result of repeating
able to be repeated
"Repeatable" means able to be repeated.

What does thoughtful mean?
full of thought
without thought
able to think
"Thoughtful" means full of thought; showing careful consideration or attention.

What does freely mean?
in a free way
the state of being free
the action of being free
"Freely" means in a free way; without interference or hindrance.

What does closeness mean?
in a close way
the state of being close
able to be close
"Closeness" means the state of being close.

What does announcement mean?
full of announcing
the result of announcing
able to be announced
"Announcement" means the result of announcing; a formal public statement about a fact or occurrence.

What does tiredness mean?
the state of being tired
without being tired
able to be tired
in a tired way
"Tiredness" means the state of being tired.

What does placement mean?
full of places
able to be placed
the result of placing
without placing
"Placement" means the result of placing; the act or process of putting something in a particular position.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Mark Twain spent his childhood on the Banks of the Mississippi river in missouri, which influenced the themes and settings of his classic american Novels.
Mark Twain spent his childhood on the banks of the Mississippi River in Missouri, which influenced the themes and settings of his classic American novels.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
Grandpa stephanopoulos grew up in a small Greek Village on the Mediterranean Sea.
Grandpa Stephanopoulos grew up in a small Greek village on the Mediterranean Sea.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
After a Blizzard dumped twelve inches of snow across the northeast, the brooklyn bridge was closed to bike riders for three
days.
After a blizzard dumped twelve inches of snow across the Northeast, the Brooklyn Bridge was closed to bike riders for three days.

Click to correct any capitalization errors.
On January 1, 1863, President Abraham Lincoln Issued the emancipation proclamation, which proclaimed the freedom of slaves in the ten states that were still in rebellion.
On January 1, 1863, President Abraham Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation, which proclaimed the freedom of slaves in the ten states that were still in rebellion.
